legalNotice.title: Legal Notice and Terms of Use
content: This website complies with Law 1581 of 2012 on Personal Data Protection, Decree 1377 of 2013, Law 1266 of 2008, Law 527 of 1999 on electronic commerce and Law 23 of 1982 on copyright, as well as other applicable regulations in the Republic of Colombia.

These General Conditions regulate access to and use of Jolman Developer's website, including the contents and services made available on it. Any person accessing the website https://jolmandeveloper.com agrees to abide by the General Conditions in force at any given time.
The user undertakes to use the website, its services and contents in accordance with Colombian legislation, good faith and public order.

The use of the website for illicit or harmful purposes, or in any way that may cause damage or prevent the normal functioning of the website, is prohibited. Regarding the contents of this website, the following are prohibited:
Its reproduction, distribution or modification, in whole or in part, unless expressly authorized by Jolman Developer as the legitimate owner.
Any violation of the rights of the provider or of Jolman Developer as the legitimate owner.
Its use for commercial or advertising purposes without authorization.

The user undertakes not to engage in any conduct that may damage the image, interests and rights of Jolman Developer or third parties, or that may damage, disable or overload the portal https://jolmandeveloper.com, or that prevents, in any way, the normal use of the website.

By virtue of the provisions of Law 23 of 1982 and other regulations on copyright, the reproduction, distribution and public communication, including its mode of making available, of all or part of the contents of this website, for commercial purposes, on any medium and by any technical means, without the authorization of Jolman Developer, is expressly prohibited. The user undertakes to respect the Intellectual and Industrial Property rights owned by Jolman Developer.

The user knows and accepts that the entire website, texts, contents (including structure, selection, ordering and presentation thereof), photographs, audiovisual material and graphics, is protected by trademarks, copyright and other legitimate rights, in accordance with international treaties and current Colombian legislation.

In the event that a user or a third party considers that a violation of their legitimate intellectual property rights has occurred due to the introduction of certain content on the website, they must notify this circumstance to Jolman Developer, indicating:

Personal data of the interested party holding the allegedly infringed rights, or indicate the representation with which they act in the event that the claim is presented by a third party other than the interested party.

Indicate the contents protected by intellectual property rights and their location on the website, the accreditation of the indicated intellectual property rights and express declaration in which the interested party takes responsibility for the truthfulness of the information provided in the notification.
Jolman Developer authorizes the establishment of links between other websites and its own, provided that the following conditions are respected:
That the link is not established from a website whose contents are contrary to the Law, morals and public order.
That an image of Jolman Developer or its products is not offered that is distorted, harmful or mistaken.

That the impression is not created that there is a non-existent commercial relationship or link between Jolman Developer and the owners, managers or advertisers from which the link is created, when this is not the case.

That the impression is not created that the contents or website of Jolman Developer belong to or have been designed by the owners, managers or advertisers on the website from which the link is established.
Jolman Developer does not grant any guarantee and is not responsible, in any case, for damages of any nature that could arise from:
The lack of availability, maintenance and effective functioning of the website, or its services and contents.
The existence of malware, malicious or harmful programs in the contents.
Unlawful, negligent, fraudulent use or contrary to this Legal Notice.
The lack of lawfulness, quality, reliability, usefulness and availability of services provided by third parties and made available to users on the website.
The provider is not responsible under any circumstances for damages that may arise from the illegal or improper use of this website.

In general, the relationships between Jolman Developer and the users of its telematic services present on this website are subject to the legislation and jurisdiction of the Republic of Colombia and its ordinary courts.
If any user has any doubts about these Legal Conditions or any comments about the website https://jolmandeveloper.com, please contact info@jolmandeveloper.com.

projects.sectionDescription: Here are some of the projects I've worked on. Click on any project to see more details.

project1.title: Auto Vidrios de Oriente (2021)
project1.description: Web solution for automotive glass company, featuring aerial promotional video, services, contact, and online quote.
project1.fullDescription: Corporate website developed in WordPress for a company specializing in the sale, installation, and repair of automotive glass. The portal (created in 2021) presents main services (repair, windshield replacement, waterproofing, tinting), contact information, branch locations, and an online quote form. Additionally, a promotional video with aerial shots taken by drone was produced and is featured in the main section of the site.

project2.title: Jolman Developer
project2.description: Professional personal portfolio, featuring projects, skills, contact, and online payment integration.
project2.fullDescription: Personal portfolio website developed with Vite, React, and TypeScript, deployed on Vercel. Showcases a selection of featured projects, professional background, technical skills, contact form, and online payment integration. Perfect as a reference for anyone seeking a modern, mobile-optimized personal website with advanced features.

project3.title: Induscom
project3.description: Importer of spare parts for trucks and heavy machinery, specialized in Chinese diesel engines, transmissions, and clutches.
project3.fullDescription: Corporate website for Induscom Colombia, a direct importer of spare parts for trucks and heavy machinery. Launched in 2025, the site features a clean layout showcasing their main product lines—Chinese diesel engines, transmissions, clutches, and specialized accessories—with a strong focus on technical advice, shipping within 24 hours, and WhatsApp support. It includes highlighted product sections, a quick quote request form, customer testimonials, and educational resources (blog). The platform builds trust through a clear warranty message and personalized assistance.

project4.title: Fundació Kālida – Spain
project4.description: Development and maintenance of landing pages and the Agenda module for the Fundació Kālida website, including implementation of new features, component optimization, and production incident resolution.
project4.fullDescription: I collaborated on the development and maintenance of the Fundació Kālida website, working in a production environment oriented to high traffic and dynamic content. My tasks included creating and refactoring landing pages (campaigns, informational content, and online sections), ensuring correct semantic markup, solid performance, and consistency with the site’s global design. I also contributed to the evolution of the Agenda module, implementing functional and UI adjustments based on support tickets: bug fixing, minor behavior changes, improvements in the presentation of activities, and alignment with the communication team’s requirements. All of this following good maintainability practices, continuous review of changes, and a strong focus on user experience.

project5.title: Feel Hospitality Advisor – Spain
project5.description: End‑to‑end development of the Feel Hospitality corporate website: architecture, responsive layout, contact form integration, and performance and accessibility optimization (WordPress).
project5.fullDescription: Complete development of the Feel Hospitality corporate website, a consultancy specialized in tourism accessibility. Starting from scratch, I defined the information architecture, implemented the responsive layout, and customized the WordPress theme in line with the brand’s identity. I integrated contact forms with validation and status messages, optimized performance (image loading, HTML structure, and assets), and took care of key accessibility aspects (heading hierarchy, contrast, alternative texts, and focus states in forms), aligned with the inclusive approach of the project. The result is a clear, conversion‑oriented landing experience that is easy to maintain and ready to scale in terms of content and services.

fullContent.intro: I offer my services as a developer through direct programming or specialized consulting.

programacionDirecta.title: Direct Programming
programacionDirecta.content: You can hire me for direct programming work on your project, whether it's a new development or maintaining existing code.

quienPuedeContratarme.title: Who Can Hire Me
quienPuedeContratarme.additional: I work with clients of all sizes, from small businesses to large corporations.

confidencialidad.title: Confidentiality
confidencialidad.content: All projects are handled with strict confidentiality. I can sign NDAs when required.

pagos.title: Payments
pagos.content: I offer flexible payment options based on project requirements and timeline.

pagosOnline.content: For your convenience, I accept online payments through secure payment gateways.

tarifas.title: Rates
tarifas.summary: Information about my service rates and pricing structure.

fullContent.intro: My rates are competitive and based on project complexity, timeline, and requirements.

cms.title: Content Management Systems
cms.content: Basic WordPress or similar CMS sites start at $500, with customization options available.

tiendaOnline.title: Online Stores
tiendaOnline.content: E-commerce solutions start at $1,200, including product setup and payment integration.

webAMedida.title: Custom Websites
webAMedida.content: Custom web applications are priced based on specific requirements, typically starting at $2,000.

appHibrida.title: Hybrid Applications
appHibrida.content: Cross-platform mobile applications start at $3,500, including both iOS and Android versions.

aclaraciones.title: Important Notes

list.title: Hosting:
list.content: Hosting services are separate and can be arranged based on client needs.

list.title: Consultations:
